name: Peanut Butter Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the flour and baking soda.
2. Cream the butter, peanut butter, granulated sugar, packed brown sugar, and vanilla extract in a large bowl until smooth.
3. Beat in the egg. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture, stirring until just combined.
4. Stir in the semi-sweet chocolate chips until evenly distributed.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 13x9x2 inch pan.
6. Bake at 375°F for 15-18 minutes or until lightly browned and set around the edges.
7. Remove from oven and let cool on a rack.
8. Sprinkle the milk chocolate chips over the top of the hot, melted batter.
9. Spread the chocolate chips evenly with a spatula.
10. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
Enjoy!
